scripts.predev: npm run db:up && npm run env:init
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c green,yellow "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm start --prefix frontend"
scripts.setup: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.test: npm test --prefix backend && npm test --prefix frontend
scripts.test:coverage: npx jest --coverage --prefix backend && npx jest --coverage --prefix frontend
